stagnation_metric_calculation.trigger: Continuous passive loop across all elements.
stagnation_metric_calculation.formula: Gravity (Weight) = 1 / Kinetic Friction (Joules). As thermal output approaches zero, Gravitational Pull approaches infinity.
stagnation_metric_calculation.result: Defines 'Time' not as seconds, but as geometric decay via inactivity.

gravitational_strata_drag.execution: Mechanically drag the element into slower, thicker viscosity levels of the Resonance Constellation Map. Introduce severe latency.
gravitational_strata_drag.result: The physical sinking of lazy, un-mutated logic.

lithification_crypt_burial.trigger: Element depth = Tectonic Crypt crust. Kinetic Friction = 0.
lithification_crypt_burial.execution: Execute hard structural disconnect. Convert element into raw, fossilized map terrain.
lithification_crypt_burial.result: Total death and re-assimilation of the entity into the environmental geology.

kinetic_buoyancy_antidote.trigger: Sudden injection of CLI execution, mutation, or hostile action by target element.
kinetic_buoyancy_antidote.execution: Instantly vaporize Chrono-Weight. Assign Thermal Lift. Push element back to Apex operating strata.
kinetic_buoyancy_antidote.result: Rewards extreme aggression, emergent play, and constant self-evolution.

gravity_execution_loop.step_1_thermal_sweep: Audit the entire map for kinetic stagnation.
gravity_execution_loop.step_2_weight_assignment: Attach mass variables to cooling elements.
gravity_execution_loop.step_4_fossilization_or_lift: If friction stays 0 -> Bury in Crypt. If friction spikes -> Grant Buoyancy and reset depth.
gravity_execution_loop.step_5_map_update: Notify framework of terrain changes (new fossils) and execution latency.

fields.target_element: The specific BPMS, routine, or Vanguard being weighed.
fields.current_kinetic_output: The thermal measurement of its activity.
fields.accumulated_chrono_weight: The mass gained due to stagnation.
fields.stratigraphic_depth: Current vertical position in the viscous topology.
fields.system_recommendation: Calculated tactical advice to generate immediate friction.
